title: Multibao Heavy Duty 50cmx35cmx75cm Stainless Steel 3 Tier Side Rolling Kitchen Service Cart Trolley for Beauty Salon Shelf BBQ Hotels Restaurants
features: This stainless steel trolley is ideal for use inside and outside , with a 3-layer drain rack and a 360-degree universal wheel. You can put vegetables, dishes, storage tanks, etc. on this trolley.
Stable stainless steel bracket structure for strong load, you can put your toiletries on the basket. And with 360-degree universal wheels, it’s easy to move.
This trolley is very popular in salons and is widely used. It is an indispensable assistant for hairdressers and beauticians.
The smooth surface is easy to clean and will only be clean when washed with water. Very simple to assembly.
We use advanced spraying technology to be safe and secure.
Length: 50cm, Width: 35cm, Height: 75cm; Color: Silver; Number of Shelves: 3
